name: catchtail
description: A lightweight Codex hook sidecar for long-running interactive sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Keep long-running Codex sessions interactive through hooks.
interface.longDescription: CatchTail adds a local queue, session history, web console, and Stop-hook long-polling so a Codex session can continue receiving user input without patching Codex internals.
defaultPrompt: Open CatchTail and keep this session waiting.
Package this project with CatchTail hooks.
